tasks.name: Fix StatusBadge icon and text alignment
tasks.description: Update the StatusBadge components to ensure proper horizontal alignment of the icon and text in both universal and admin-specific implementations.
tasks.notes: These changes ensure that the icon and text in all status badges throughout the application are properly aligned horizontally, making the UI more visually appealing and consistent.

relatedFiles.description: Update the universal StatusBadge component to improve icon and text alignment
Update the admin-specific StatusBadge component to improve icon and text alignment

tasks.implementationGuide:
1. Update the universal StatusBadge component (src/components/ui/StatusBadge.tsx):
- Change flex to inline-flex for better alignment
- Add justify-center to center the content horizontally
- Add justify-center to the icon span for better alignment
- Add align-middle to the text span to align it vertically with the icon

2. Update the admin-specific StatusBadge component (src/components/admin/ui/StatusBadge.tsx):
- Add items-center to the className prop to ensure proper vertical alignment of the icon and text
tasks.verificationCriteria:
1. The icon and text in the StatusBadge component should be properly aligned horizontally
2. The alignment should work correctly in both LTR and RTL layouts
3. The changes should not affect the functionality of the StatusBadge component
tasks.analysisResult: Fix the alignment of status icons and text in the StatusBadge component to ensure they are displayed side by side rather than stacked.
tasks.summary: Successfully fixed the alignment of status icons and text in the StatusBadge component by updating both the universal StatusBadge and admin-specific StatusBadge components with proper flex alignment classes. Changed flex to inline-flex, added justify-center for horizontal alignment, and added align-middle for vertical alignment. These changes ensure consistent and visually appealing display of status badges throughout the application.
